'''Babo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] in the [[Bothan Navy]].

==Biography==
===Second Galactic Civil War===
By [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], as conflict broke out between [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] soon became involved. Before long, [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], now head of the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]], began rounding up, interning and executing Bothans on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] due to the support they demonstrated towards Corellia and the actions of the [[True Victory Party]]. When [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] joined Corellia militarily, Babo was one of the Bothan Admirals who became active in the [[Confederation]] military as an admiral, commanding part of the Bothan fleet at the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kashyyyk]], engaging the [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fifth Fleet]].

After the battle, Babo met with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Solo]], and [[Tojjelnoot]]. At first, he attempted to enlist the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], and the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] into the Confederation, but he later agreed to consider the [[Jedi Coalition]] opposed to [[Darth Caedus]]—the former Jacen Solo—as neutral. He informed the others that the Bothans intended to assassinate Caedus, and requested that Skywalker and the Solos sanction the Bothan plans—which they did. Hundreds of these Bothan assassins were captured and detained by the Galactic Alliance Guard.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{1st}}
